title: Expiry mechanism causes incorrect collateral damage
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, username VARCHAR NOT NULL, expiry_date DATE, is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE);
INSERT INTO users (username, expiry_date, is_active) VALUES ('user1', '2023-10-01', TRUE);
INSERT INTO users (username, expiry_date, is_active) VALUES ('user2', NULL, FALSE);
UPDATE users SET is_active = FALSE WHERE expiry_date < CURRENT_DATE;
SELECT username FROM users WHERE is_active = TRUE OR (expiry_date IS NULL AND is_active = TRUE);
